name: OpenCode Runtime
summary: Set up OpenCode as a formal NextClaw runtime entry through nextclaw-opencode-narp, with provider-route inheritance and real model plus agent task smoke.

summaryI18n.en: Set up OpenCode as a formal NextClaw runtime entry through nextclaw-opencode-narp, with provider-route inheritance and real model plus agent task smoke.
summaryI18n.zh: 通过 nextclaw-opencode-narp 把 OpenCode 接成正式 NextClaw runtime，并覆盖 provider route 继承、真实模型与 agent 任务冒烟。

description: Use this skill when OpenCode/opencode needs to become a formal NextClaw session type instead of a core runtime fork or legacy plugin path. It guides `nextclaw-opencode-narp` runtime entry setup, `opencode acp` installation checks, prompt-scoped OpenCode provider config generation, session-type readiness, and real text plus file-writing agent smoke.

descriptionI18n.en: Use this skill when OpenCode/opencode needs to become a formal NextClaw session type instead of a core runtime fork or legacy plugin path. It guides `nextclaw-opencode-narp` runtime entry setup, `opencode acp` installation checks, prompt-scoped OpenCode provider config generation, session-type readiness, and real text plus file-writing agent smoke.
descriptionI18n.zh: 当需要把 OpenCode/opencode 接成正式 NextClaw 会话类型，而不是新增 core runtime 或走旧插件路径时使用。它覆盖 `nextclaw-opencode-narp` runtime entry 配置、`opencode acp` 安装检查、按 prompt 生成 OpenCode provider 配置、会话类型就绪，以及真实文本与文件写入 agent 冒烟。

author: NextClaw
